tags.evidence: Notice your jaw... Now your shoulders... Now the breath
the first move against a power is to name it
there is a bottom of the breath you have not been visiting
he refused to call it stupidity or evil
un-make a fascist by un-making the armor
every body that learns to unhold... dismantling the smallest cell
reach the held body through the body instead of the mind
In Character Analysis he stated it flatly
so I lay down. I lay down for four months
curious about what it is actually like down there
give yourself room to be curious about what it is
once the holding stopped... did not have to
stop fighting the floor long enough to actually look
The woods were being held, which is a different physical state
safe enough to set the holding down
shake the armor loose: singing, moving, sitting still
held in a kind of curious attention
sing them there, welcome them there, invite them there
the awake part gets recognized... in someone else
I trained in it for ten years as a kid
how, when the feeling of defeat starts to creep... to cast it aside
decline, anyway, to collapse inward
you will always recognize it in someone else
a going-down... every old initiation built a container for
The important thing... is to practice
the room arranges itself toward your attention
running the shift themselves: the council's elected delegates
The thread has never broken... passed through many hands
seeds scattered in a neighborhood you're not sure will hold
paying ferocious attention to the world from a room
The birds she had named, that she fed
fed through the bars of her window
feeding birds she had named, writing the analysis
Making sure the next generation understood why
making the thinking available, rather than the direction
build the conditions and get out of the way
the regional councils, the Juntas de Buen Gobierno
not to win but to be heard
refusing to naturalize the difference
the conclusion that follows from looking clearly
gone to the specific places... and she had named them
the movement refusing to become invisible
She was there to document what was about to disappear
the thing the aggregate numbers don't do
first wrote his own name, then wrote the word
It was made. By specific people, for specific reasons
look at this word you already know... Stay with it
What becomes possible when enough of us cultivate that attention
the quality of presence that witnessing requires
a neighbor brings food when you're sick
you follow with your eyes a mountain range on the horizon
The fragment held in the hand long enough to see
finding fragments... the twentieth had buried
give this move a name — detournement
the moment a fragment of the past suddenly becomes readable
